slides.headline: AI agents for more human customer experiences.
slides.subheadline: A public-information overview of Sierra's platform, product capabilities, and published customer outcomes.
slides.note: Prepared from publicly available Sierra materials · Accessed 22 June 2026

slides.headline: Better experiences have traditionally meant higher service costs.
slides.subheadline: Sierra describes an age-old tension between serving customers better and controlling cost.

cards.title: Rigid experiences
cards.body: Traditional bots often rely on scripts and decision trees.

cards.title: Disconnected channels
cards.body: Separate tools can create inconsistent customer experiences.

cards.title: Cost pressure
cards.body: Scaling personalised service with people alone can be expensive.

slides.headline: AI agents as an always-on customer experience layer.
slides.subheadline: Public materials emphasise availability, multilingual service, and one agent across channels.

slides.headline: An agent that understands, reasons, and acts.
slides.subheadline: Sierra says its agents use company knowledge, follow brand guidance, connect to systems, and complete tasks.

cards.title: Understands context
cards.body: Uses natural language and conversation context.

cards.title: Stays on brand
cards.body: Applies configured knowledge, policies, tone, and guidelines.

cards.title: Takes action
cards.body: Connects to systems of record to complete workflows.

cards.title: Supports handoffs
cards.body: Hands off smoothly to live agents when needed.

slides.headline: Build, connect, deploy, and improve an AI agent.
slides.subheadline: This sequence reflects capabilities described across Sierra's public product pages.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Create and modify agents with Ghostwriter and Agent Studio.

steps.title: Connect
steps.body: Link knowledge and systems where customer data and actions live.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.body: Serve customers across supported channels and languages.

steps.title: Improve
steps.body: Use Insights and Explorer to analyse conversations and optimise.

slides.headline: One agent across the channels customers already use.
slides.subheadline: Sierra states one agent can deliver consistent experiences across these channels.

cards.title: Chat
cards.body: Web and in-app conversations.

cards.title: Voice
cards.body: Spoken support over the phone.

cards.title: Email
cards.body: Asynchronous written support.

cards.title: SMS
cards.body: Text-message conversations.

cards.title: WhatsApp
cards.body: Messaging where customers already are.

cards.title: ChatGPT
cards.body: Reach customers inside ChatGPT.

slides.eyebrow: From scripted bots to AI agents
slides.headline: Sierra distinguishes agents from scripted automation.
Trust, security, governance, and quality assurance.
slides.subheadline: Sierra's pages describe configurable guardrails, monitoring, integrations, and live-agent handoffs.

cards.title: Governance
cards.body: Define brand guidelines, goals, guardrails, and escalation.

cards.title: Integration
cards.body: Securely connect agents to knowledge and systems of record.

cards.title: Measurement
cards.body: Review resolution, satisfaction, and agent performance.

slides.headline: Stories spanning support, commerce, retention, and recovery.
slides.subheadline: These are examples reported by Sierra; applicability depends on each company's systems and deployment.

cards.title: Returns and orders
cards.body: Next uses an agent for arrange-return queries and identity verification.

cards.title: Member support
cards.body: WeightWatchers publishes containment and CSAT results for its agent.

cards.title: Subscriber service
cards.body: SiriusXM uses a tailored agent for customer self-service.

cards.title: Payments
cards.body: Sierra publishes PCI-compliant payment capabilities across chat and voice.

slides.headline: Measurable outcomes from named deployments.
slides.subheadline: Figures are taken from Sierra's own customer stories and shown with their original context.

metrics.label: WeightWatchers cases contained in week one
Singtel time to live reported by Sierra

slides.note: Scale claim: in May 2026 Sierra stated its platform served over 40% of the Fortune 50 and powered billions of interactions. Source: Sierra customer stories · "Better customer experiences. Built on Sierra" (4 May 2026)

slides.headline: Reasoning, action, channels, and outcomes.
slides.subheadline: Sierra's public differentiation centres on what an agent can actually do.

cards.title: Action, not answers alone
cards.body: Agents connect to systems and complete customer tasks.

cards.title: One agent across channels
cards.body: Chat, SMS, WhatsApp, email, voice, and ChatGPT.

cards.title: Configured to the brand
cards.body: Define knowledge, tone, guidelines, goals, and guardrails.

cards.title: Outcome-based pricing
cards.body: Pricing can be tied to specific valuable outcomes delivered.

slides.headline: Test, refine, launch, and expand agents over time.
slides.subheadline: Customer stories show teams maturing agents through a repeatable loop.

steps.title: Define
steps.body: Choose customer journeys and desired outcomes.

steps.title: Configure
steps.body: Add knowledge, brand guidance, goals, and guardrails.

steps.title: Integrate
steps.body: Connect relevant systems and supported channels.

steps.title: Expand
steps.body: Add journeys, languages, channels, or markets.

slides.note: A synthesis of Sierra's public materials, not a guaranteed implementation plan.

slides.headline: Explore where a Sierra agent could improve a customer journey.
slides.subheadline: Use Sierra's public materials and a direct conversation to validate fit, scope, security, integrations, pricing, and outcomes.
slides.note: Prepared from publicly available Sierra materials · Accessed 22 June 2026 · No affiliation or endorsement implied

slides.headline: Built only from Sierra's public materials.
slides.subheadline: No private information, inferred roadmap, valuation, customer promise, or endorsement is presented.
slides.note: For external use, verify Sierra's website has not changed and retain source wording and customer-specific context.
